title: Better FPS (Modpack)
description: Utilizes the power of Vulkan API to give you the best performance boost, even on 10-year-old hardware.
body:
[My Website](https://pandadev.net) **Important: Since Vulkan is a fundamentally different graphics API, many mods will not work.** ***

This modpack aims to run on every last potato hardware you can build a pc with. I personally tested this on an HP EliteBook i5-6600U and got stable 100 FPS, whereas Sodium would sit at 30-40 FPS. ***

If you have issues, join my [discord](https://discord.gg/Y7SbYphVw9). For people that want to add the own mods, [here](https://github.com/xCollateral/VulkanMod/issues/46) is a list of incompatible/compatible mods. *** Check out my other projects on [my profile](https://modrinth.com/user/PandaDEV)
